chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 903 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6566/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.3969/2025 (U/A) 3. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 4. For orders on CMA No.3970/2025 (Ex.A) 5. For hearing of main case. 01-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< 1. Matter is already fixed on 25-11-2025. Counsel for the Petitioner pleads urgency, therefore, the application for urgent hearing is allowed and matter is taken up today. 2to5. Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition along with listed applications and submits that at the first instance, the Petitioner will approach the Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
